MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry S. Landsberg, Esq., and Andrew H. Struve, Esq., of MANATT PHELPS PHILLIPS (310) 312-4355 appeared on behalf of demurring party St. Francis Memorial Hospital. Lawrence F. Padway, Esq., (510) 814-0680, appeared on behalf of the plaintiff and opposing party Grauberger.

For Stay Pending Completion Of Federal Proceedings; Memo Of P&A In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
A P P E A R A N C E S:
Barry S. Landsberg, Esq. and Andrew H. Struve, Esq. of MANATT, PHELPHS & PHILLIPS, LLP 310/312-4000 for defendants SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL AND CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST moving for a stay pending completion of federal proceedings
Laurence F. Padway, Esq. 510/814-0680 opposing party
A R G U E D and counsel were directed to meet and confer. The matter was passed to allow them to do this. Matter recalled and counsel entered into a stipulation that Defendants reserve the right to seek a further stay; that mutual discovery motions be set for May 6th; that Defendants shall have to May 15th to file a responsive pleading; and that Plaintiff's motion to restore case to the Civil Active List will not be opposed.
(JJM/AF) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
